name: Castopod
description: Castopod is a free and open-source podcast hosting platform with Podcasting 2.0, analytics and ActivityPub federation features.

notes.text: Complete the initial setup at http://IP/cp-install, then sign in through http://IP/cp-admin.
Set a public HTTPS domain in /opt/castopod/.env before publishing podcasts or enabling ActivityPub federation.
Podcast media is stored in /opt/castopod/public/media. Include it and the MariaDB database in regular container backups.
